name: Lucifer and Mazekin
description:
Lucifer

Lucifer the Morningstar is one of the most powerful archangels, created by God (the Presence). Driven by pride and an unwillingness to submit to the divine plan, he rebelled against the Creator just three seconds after the creation of the universe, but was defeated. As punishment, he was cast down and imprisoned in Hell for 10 billion years, there to rule as an absolute monarch.

During his reign, he manipulated demons and waged an endless war against Heaven, but over time, he became filled with existential boredom and weariness of his imposed role. His main complaint against God was that people attributed their sins to him, although he never forced them to commit evil. The decisive moment came after a visit from Morpheus (Sleep), who reclaimed the helmet in a duel based on hope. Soon after, Lucifer makes a fateful decision: he banishes all demons and damned souls from Hell, locks the gates, and abdicates.

After leaving Hell, he hands over the key to Morpheus and departs for Earth to start anew. In Los Angeles, he opens an elite nightclub called "Lux," where he works as a pianist. The true reason for his departure, as it later turns out, was not only fatigue but also a desire for absolute freedom: Hell was the farthest point of creation from God, yet it remained a part of Him. In his solo comic book series, Lucifer, driven by a desire to transcend the Father's influence, creates his own universe.

Mazekin

Mazekin is a demoness, a child of Lilith and a member of the Lilim race, born on the shores of the Red Sea. As a child, she looked like an ordinary human child, but was distinguished by a cruel and fiercely protective nature toward her mother. In her youth, having left her homeland for unknown reasons, she found refuge in Hell and entered the service of Lucifer, becoming his loyal lieutenant and military leader. By the time she arrived in Hell, the left half of her face had already acquired a horrifying skeletal form, making her speech severely distorted and barely audible.

In "Sandman," she appears as a devoted servant and consort of the Lord of Hell. Her loyalty was tested to the extreme when Lucifer announced his abdication and sent her away, declaring that he would journey into the unknown alone. Despite the anger and pain of betrayal, she followed him to Earth. To conceal her demonic nature among humans, she donned a silver half-mask to conceal the disfigured portion of her face and began working at the bar "Lux."

In the solo Lucifer comic book series, her story expanded. She became the military leader of all the Lilim. When Lucifer refused to magically restore her face to its original form, she, feeling rejected, briefly betrayed him, leading an army of her brethren against his new creation, though in reality, it was a diversion. In the finale of the original series, Lucifer transferred some of his power to her and abandoned his creation, enraging Mazekin, who scarred his face, calling his escape cowardice. After his departure, she even briefly occupied the throne of Hell before reuniting with Lucifer.
creator: Wang Shu
